Name: Rage
Description: Works all units up into a blind rage

Name: Goo Ball
Description: Spills goo on the field. Heals allies and slows enemies

Name: Divine Shield
Description: Provides a divine shield of protection making you and your units invulnerable for a short time

Name: Meteor Strike
Description: Calls down a giant meteor from the sky dealing massive damage to enemy units

Name: Tidal Wave
Description: Sends a huge tidal wave at the opposing castle, dealing damage and pushing all enemies back

Name: Black Hole
Description: Creates a giant black hole on the field that pulls in and damages all units
